title: Coconut Panna Cotta
excerpt: Ingredients 65 ml cold water 15 ml gelatine 400 ml coconut milk 300 ml cream 125 ml castor sugar 10 ml vanilla essence (or 5 ml vanilla extract) berry syrup to taste fresh berries Method Spray 4 – 6 dishes or moulds with non-stick spray and arrange on a baking tray or platter. Pour the water …
html:
Ingredients

  • 65 ml cold water
  • 15 ml gelatine
  • 400 ml coconut milk
  • 300 ml cream
  • 125 ml castor sugar
  • 10 ml vanilla essence (or 5 ml vanilla extract)
  • berry syrup to taste
  • fresh berries

Method

Spray 4 – 6 dishes or moulds with non-stick spray and arrange on a baking tray or platter.

Pour the water into a small bowl and sprinkle the gelatine over.

Stir gently and let stand until the mixture is spongy.

Meanwhile, heat the coconut milk, cream and sugar slowly and stir until the sugar has dissolved.

Add the bloomed gelatine and vanilla and stir until the gelatine has melted.

Pour the mixture through a sieve into a jug.

Fill the dishes or moulds with the mixture and place in the fridge for a few hours or until the panna cottas have set.

To serve, turn the dishes or moulds out onto individual serving plates, spoon berry syrup over and alongside the panna cottas, and garnish with berries.

Makes 4 – 6 servings.

Easy!
